pages.title: Quick Install
pages.description: Step-by-step guide to install Lightpack PHP via Composer and start your first project.

pages.title: Routing
pages.description: Define application routes, route parameters, route filters, and request handling patterns.

pages.title: Controllers
pages.description: Create and organize controllers to handle HTTP requests and application logic.

pages.title: Views
pages.description: Build responsive views using Lightpack's template engine with layouts and partials.

pages.title: Request
pages.description: Access and manipulate HTTP requests including headers, body, files, and query parameters.

pages.title: Response
pages.description: Craft HTTP responses with JSON, redirects, downloads, caching headers, and custom status codes.

pages.title: Sessions
pages.description: Manage user sessions securely with flash messages, intended URLs, and custom session drivers.

pages.title: Cookies
pages.description: Set, get, encrypt, and expire cookies with secure defaults and path scoping.

pages.title: Validation
pages.description: Validate user input with built-in rules, custom validators, and error message handling.

pages.title: Filesystem
pages.description: Work with local files and directory operations.

pages.title: Configuration
pages.description: Structure and load application configuration files per environment.

pages.title: Environments
pages.description: Configure environment variables and settings for local, staging, and production.

pages.title: Date & Time
pages.description: Parse, format, and manipulate dates and times with an expressive API.

pages.title: Utility Functions
pages.description: Handy helper functions for arrays, strings, URLs, paths, and common operations.

pages.title: Connection
pages.description: Configure and manage MySQL database connections.

pages.title: Query Builder
pages.description: Compose database queries programmatically without writing raw SQL.

pages.title: Migrations
pages.description: Version-control your database schema with reversible migration scripts.

pages.title: Seeder
pages.description: Populate your database with test and sample data using seed classes.

pages.title: Factory
pages.description: Generate realistic test data models programmatically for testing and development.

pages.title: Pagination
pages.description: Paginate database results using the query builder and Lucid ORM with built-in link generation.

pages.title: Introduction
pages.description: Get started with Lucid ORM, Lightpack's powerful and intuitive object-relational mapper.

pages.title: Models
pages.description: Define Lucid models, configure table mapping, mass assignment, timestamps, and soft deletes.

pages.title: Relationships
pages.description: Map one-to-one, one-to-many, and many-to-many relationships with eager loading support.

pages.title: Eager Loading
pages.description: Solve the N+1 query problem by preloading related model data efficiently.

pages.title: Collections
pages.description: Transform query results into powerful collection objects with filtering and mapping methods.

pages.title: Transformers
pages.description: Serialize model data for APIs with field selection, includes, and nested resource control.

pages.title: Multi-Tenancy
pages.description: Build SaaS applications with tenant-isolated databases and row-level scoping.

pages.title: Introduction
pages.description: Implement session and token-based authentication with guards and user providers.

pages.title: API Access Tokens
pages.description: Generate and authenticate API requests using secure personal access tokens.

pages.title: Configuration
pages.description: Customize authentication drivers, user providers, and password hashing settings.

pages.title: Extending Auth
pages.description: Build custom authentication guards and user providers for specialized use cases.

pages.title: Route Filters
pages.description: Protect routes with built-in auth filters, role checks, and custom access policies.

pages.title: Password
pages.description: Hash, verify, and validate passwords securely using industry-standard algorithms.

pages.title: Crypto
pages.description: Encrypt and decrypt sensitive data with AES-256 and secure key management.

pages.title: URL
pages.description: Build, sign, and resolve application URLs with query parameters and named routes.

pages.title: Image
pages.description: Resize, crop, watermark, and convert images with an expressive manipulation API.

pages.description: Throttle HTTP requests per user or IP to prevent abuse and ensure fair usage.

pages.title: Mutex Lock
pages.description: Prevent race conditions with distributed file and database-based locking mechanisms.

pages.title: Process
pages.description: Run background processes, shell commands, and manage output streams safely.

pages.description: Filter, map, flatten, dot-access, and manipulate PHP arrays with utility helpers.

pages.description: Transform, truncate, slugify, randomize, and match strings with fluent helpers.

pages.description: Create reusable before and after filters for cross-cutting request concerns.

pages.description: Receive, verify signatures, and process incoming webhook payloads securely.

pages.title: AI
pages.description: AI-powered features including embeddings, similarity search, tools, and semantic analysis

pages.description: Real-time event broadcasting with channel subscriptions and event pushing.
